groupDefinition.name: Setup View
groupDefinition.description: Initial configuration interface for connection parameters and environment initialization.

items.title: Extend `GdbConfigService` Configuration Model
items.description: Extend the config object into a complete DAP connection configuration interface
details: Rename service to `DapConfigService` (aligning with the generic DAP concept in the spec)
[Test] Verify `setConfig()` and `getConfig()` correctly store and return complete `DapConfig` data

items.title: Setup Form Field Completion
items.description: Complete all Setup form fields per spec [§3.1](system-specification.md#31-initialization-setup-view-setup)
details: Add **Launch Mode** selector (`mat-button-toggle` or `mat-radio`: Launch / Attach)
Button text dynamically switches based on Launch Mode ("Launch" / "Attach")

items.title: Setup Form Validation
items.description: Implement real-time form validation per spec [§7.3](system-specification.md#73-user-configuration-validation)
details: Required field validation + inline error messages
Launch/Attach button disabled when validation fails

items.title: Integrate Frontend Setup Handshake with Dynamic sessionPath and Connection States
items.description: Integrate the client-side setup handshake flow within Setup components, enabling dynamic session path and connection state orchestration.
details: Update SetupWebComponent and SetupElectronComponent to pass the correct session path and config arguments during connection
Implement user UI selection to choose between opening an existing session path or creating a new session path, triggering open-session vs new-session setup commands dynamically
Update DapSessionService to parse session-ready responses and dynamically synchronize DapConfigService parameters
Ensure the frontend correctly handles the session-failed state, displays appropriate errors, and closes the connection cleanly
[Test] Verify that opening an existing session without program arguments successfully sends open-session and populates frontend config
[Test] Verify that launching a new session with program arguments successfully sends new-session with complete configurations
